name: Postman MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Postman MCP server from Postmanlabs enabling AI agents to interact with Postman — reading and executing Postman collections, managing APIs and environments, running API tests, querying collection structures, and integrating Postman's API development and testing platform into agent-driven API testing, documentation, and development workflows.
use_cases: Executing Postman collections for API testing from QA automation agents
Reading API documentation from Postman collections from developer assistance agents
Managing Postman environments and variables from API development agents
Analyzing API test results from quality monitoring agents
Generating API test reports from reporting agents
Exploring API structure from API discovery agents
not_for: Teams using Insomnia, Bruno, or other REST clients (different platforms)
Production API load testing at scale (use dedicated load testing tools)
best_when: An agent needs to work with Postman collections — for API testing automation, documentation access, or development workflow integration.
avoid_when: You're using Insomnia, Bruno, or another API client — or if you need high-volume load testing rather than functional API testing.

auth.notes: Postman API key from account settings. Key provides access to workspace resources based on user permissions. Read-only and read-write scopes available. Team workspace requires appropriate team membership.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 3 users, unlimited collections, 1000 API calls/month
pricing.notes: Postman free tier includes the API and basic features. Paid plans for team collaboration, more API calls, and advanced features. Official Postman MCP server.

performance.rate_limits: Postman API: 1000 requests/month (free); higher on paid plans

known_agent_gotchas: API rate limits vary by plan — free tier 1000/month may be exhausted quickly by agents
Collection IDs and UID format used for referencing — must discover before operations
Executing collections requires Newman (Postman CLI) locally — not always available
Environment variables must be set before collection execution for dynamic values
Team vs personal workspaces have different access control
Official Postman MCP — stable and well-maintained, but rate limits are the main constraint
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Postman API key auth. SOC2, GDPR. Official Postman Labs MCP. Protect API key. Collections may contain sensitive API credentials — ensure collection security practices.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. SOC2, GDPR. Official Postman Labs MCP. Protect API key. Collections may store sensitive credentials — apply collection-level security practices.
